name: reset_runs
full_help:
reset_runs

Description: 
Reset existing run(s).

Syntax: 
reset_runs  [-prev_step] [-from_step <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose] <runs>...

Usage: 
  Name          Description
  -------------------------
  [-prev_step]  Reset last run step
  [-from_step]  First Step to reset
  [-quiet]      Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]    Suspend message limits during command execution
  <runs>        Runs to modify

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
